title: Pulse by
description: The block analyzes the text at the T input using user-defined search criteria.

outputs.summary: Pulse when search pattern is found.

properties.description: If the search pattern is included in the text at input T, a pulse is generated at output P. The two wildcards '*' and '?' can be used ('*' = sequence of any characters of any length, '?' = any character). Example: '???nder*' applies to 'grinder', but also to 'thunderstorm'

If the search pattern is included in the text at input T, a pulse is generated at output P. The two wildcards '*' and '?' can be used ('*' = sequence of any characters of any length, '?' = any character). Example: '???nder*' applies to 'grinder', but also to 'thunderstorm'
